string.text: You need to bring tools to Palych so he can perform equipment upgrades.

You know, buddy, I'm actually a pretty good technician. I can fix weapons and armor, even do some upgrades! Well, I would if I had proper tools. But where would I get them here? Maybe you can help me find a simple set?
I need a set of tools for rough work. It should have the tools and oils for working with weapons. If you can get it, I'd appreciate it, and maybe even pay you!.. Probably.
Great, dude! Oh, sorry, I have no way to pay you. But I can offer you a good discount!
You need to bring Palych tools for fine work. He needs a more complete set to perform more complex equipment upgrades.
Hey, dude, if you agree to get me a more complete set, you'll get an even bigger discount. Will you help me, buddy?
I need tools for fine work. It should have everything I need. You'll be like a brother to me if you bring it!

Wow, thanks, bro! Now I'm definitely going to get rich. Damn, I'm going to be successful!.. If, of course, I don't miss this chance. But for now, I can't offer you anything better than a discount. Sorry, buddy.
You need to bring Palych %s. He needs a unique set to perform even more complex equipment upgrades.
Hey, man, if you find something worth it, I'll give you a discount!
I need calibration tools. It should have everything I need. You'll be like a brother to me if you bring them!

No f***ing way...! Damn, thanks, bro! Now I'm definitely going to get rich. Damn, I'm going to be successful!.. If, of course, I don't miss this chance. But for now, I can't offer you anything better than a discount. Sorry, buddy.
